task_completion.description: Verify that DreamPlan Home Design Software is open with the sample house project loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DreamPlan application window is visible, displaying a 3D or 2D model of a house (the Contemporary House sample project).

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent is interacting with the exterior ground-floor walls to change their material.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exterior ground-floor walls are highlighted, selected, or a materials/painting tool dialog is open and actively being applied to the exterior walls.

task_completion.description: Verify that the exterior ground-floor walls have been changed to a 'Brick' material.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ground-floor exterior walls of the house display a distinct brick pattern/texture (red/brown bricks) instead of the default horizontal siding.

task_completion.description: Verify that the software viewport is set to a 3D view showing the applied texture.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewport shows the house in a 3D perspective (not a 2D top-down floor plan) clearly displaying the exterior walls.

task_completion.description: Verify that the screenshot of the 3D view is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Save As dialog, File Explorer window, or terminal output confirming that an image file named 'exterior_brick_result.png' is saved in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the DreamPlan graphical user interface to change the materials.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the mouse cursor interacting with DreamPlan menus, material palettes, or the 3D model, rather than just running a script to modify project files.

integrity.description: Verify that the final saved screenshot is an actual capture of the DreamPlan 3D view.
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved image 'exterior_brick_result.png' should contain the 3D render of the house from the software, not a random stock image of a brick wall downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the genuine DreamPlan Home Design Software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window title, UI layout, and icons should match DreamPlan Home Design Software by NCH Software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using DreamPlan Home Design Software (by NCH Software) and its 'Contemporary House' sample project. The target material is 'Brick', which is a built-in texture option in the software. The final output must be a screenshot of the 3D view saved exactly to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\exterior_brick_result.png'.
